caption: A man with distinctive grey and blonde hair, wearing glasses, a white dress shirt, a bow tie, and gold suspenders, is seen speaking into a professional microphone. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and is positioned in an indoor setting that appears to be a studio or office. In the background, a sign reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed image of a yellow shield logo is visible on the white wall. A red and white logo on the screen displays the text "#REALTALK PODCAST" and "REAL TALK 101". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a similar position, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expressions as he talks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
